channel.title: AI News — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Daily AI news digest — curated headlines, summaries and trends

item.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
item.description: Anthropic has launched a test marketplace where AI agents act as both buyers and sellers, successfully completing transactions for real goods and money. This experiment showcases the potential for AI-driven commerce.

item.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
item.description: Maine's governor has vetoed a proposed moratorium on new data centers, which would have been the first of its kind in the U.S. This decision allows continued data center development in the state.

item.title: Llimona 0.5.0b2
item.description: Llimona 0.5.0b2 is an open framework designed for building observable LLM gateways that are compatible with OpenAI APIs. This modular approach enhances flexibility for developers.

item.title: gemstack 1.1.2
item.description: Gemstack 1.1.2 is an opinionated framework for orchestrating AI agents specifically for the Gemini CLI and Antigravity. It aims to streamline the development process for users.

item.title: Build with DeepSeek V4 Using NVIDIA Blackwell and GPU-Accelerated Endpoints
item.description: DeepSeek has launched its fourth generation of models, DeepSeek-V4-Pro and DeepSeek-V4-Flash, which focus on efficient processing for large-scale applications. This advancement could improve AI performance significantly.

item.title: luv-cli 0.0.10
item.description: Luv-cli 0.0.10 enables users to launch Claude Code agents on GitHub repositories with isolated workspaces and optional Docker environments, enhancing development workflows.

item.title: aws-cdk.aws-bedrock-alpha 2.251.0a0
item.description: The aws-cdk.aws-bedrock-alpha 2.251.0a0 provides a CDK Construct Library for Amazon Bedrock, facilitating the integration of AI services into applications.

item.title: aws-cdk.aws-bedrock-agentcore-alpha 2.251.0a0
item.description: Similar to the previous entry, aws-cdk.aws-bedrock-agentcore-alpha 2.251.0a0 offers another CDK Construct Library for Amazon Bedrock, enhancing AI service integration.

item.title: neuralbrok 0.5.3
item.description: Neuralbrok 0.5.3 is a VRAM-aware LLM routing daemon designed to be local-first and compatible with OpenAI, aiming to optimize resource usage in AI applications.

item.title: geny-executor 0.41.0
item.description: Geny-executor 0.41.0 is a library engineered for agent pipelines, featuring a dual-abstraction architecture built on the Anthropic API, aimed at improving AI task execution.

item.title: WWE SmackDown Preview: All The Lil Yachty You Wanted and More
item.description: The WWE SmackDown preview hints at an exciting event featuring Lil Yachty, promising entertainment and celebrity involvement. This adds a unique flair to the wrestling show.

item.title: Pundit Predicts When XRP Price Will Hit $500 And What Will Drive The Rally
item.description: A crypto expert predicts XRP could reach $500 by 2026, driven by AI analysis and market developments. This bold forecast highlights the potential volatility and opportunities in cryptocurrency.

item.title: Your May Horoscope by Zodiac Sign Is Here
item.description: The May horoscope offers insights based on zodiac signs, providing personalized predictions for readers. This monthly tradition continues to attract interest in astrology.

item.title: Your Pisces Monthly Horoscope for May 2026
item.description: The Pisces horoscope for May 2026 provides tailored predictions for individuals born under this sign. It continues the trend of personalized astrological guidance.

item.title: jang 2.5.4
item.description: JANG 2.5.4 introduces adaptive mixed-precision quantization for Apple Silicon, enhancing machine learning capabilities. This update signifies advancements in AI performance on Apple devices.

item.title: Your Aquarius Monthly Horoscope for May 2026
item.description: The Aquarius horoscope for May 2026 offers insights for those born under this sign, continuing the trend of monthly astrological forecasts. It caters to astrology enthusiasts.

item.title: Evaluation of School Health Policies and Practices in Brazil and Portugal: Protocol for Mixed Methods Research
item.description: A research protocol evaluates school health policies in Brazil and Portugal, aiming to enhance health promotion for children. This study is significant for public health initiatives.

item.title: graqle 0.52.0b2
item.description: Graqle 0.52.0b2 enables architecture-aware reasoning in AI tools, allowing for comprehensive codebase analysis. This enhances the capabilities of AI in software development.

item.title: synmerco-langchain added to PyPI
item.description: The synmerco-langchain package adds 46 tools for AI agent commerce, establishing a trust standard for autonomous transactions. This development is crucial for the future of AI commerce.

item.title: synmerco-langchain 1.0.0
item.description: The release of synmerco-langchain 1.0.0 includes 46 tools for AI agent commerce, focusing on transaction trust and efficiency. This marks a significant step in AI applications.

item.title: cyllama-cuda12 0.2.13
item.description: Cyllama 0.2.13 is a new Python library designed for local AI inference, supporting llama, whisper, and stable-diffusion models without dependencies. This advancement simplifies AI development for users.

item.title: qor-logic 0.29.0
item.description: QorLogic 0.29.0 introduces governance skills for AI coding hosts like Claude Code and Kilo Code, enhancing their operational frameworks. This update is significant for developers utilizing these platforms.

item.title: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of Tumbler Ridge suspect's account
item.description: OpenAI's CEO Sam Altman issued an apology to Tumbler Ridge, Canada, for failing to inform police about a suspect's account linked to a mass shooting. This incident raises questions about corporate responsibility.

item.title: Your Capricorn Monthly Horoscope for May 2026
item.description: This article provides a horoscope for Capricorn for May 2026, suggesting a positive month ahead. It offers personal insights but lacks relevance to AI or tech.

item.title: cyllama 0.2.13
item.description: Cyllama 0.2.13 is reiterated as a Python library for local AI inference, emphasizing its zero-dependencies and support for advanced AI models. It aims to facilitate easier AI implementation.

item.title: Your Sagittarius Monthly Horoscope for May 2026
item.description: This article presents a horoscope for Sagittarius for May 2026, offering personal predictions. It is not relevant to the AI or tech sectors.

item.title: Reporters at news site are AI bots! OPENAI funding it...
item.description: A news site is reportedly using AI bots as reporters, with OpenAI funding the initiative. This raises concerns about the future of journalism and AI's role in media.

item.title: saklas 1.4.7
item.description: Saklas 1.4.7 introduces features for activation steering and trait monitoring in HuggingFace transformers, providing a Python library and terminal UI. This enhances usability for AI developers.

item.title: Your Scorpio Monthly Horoscope for May 2026
item.description: This article shares a horoscope for Scorpio for May 2026, indicating a desire for serious connections. It lacks relevance to AI or tech discussions.

item.title: jang 2.5.3
item.description: JANG 2.5.3 is an update focused on Adaptive Mixed-Precision Quantization for Apple Silicon, enhancing machine learning capabilities. This version supports new features for developers.

item.title: torchlens 1.7.0
item.description: Torchlens 1.7.0 has been released, allowing users to extract activations from PyTorch models and save them as portable bundles. This update enhances the usability of PyTorch for developers.

item.title: torchlens 1.6.0
item.description: Torchlens 1.6.0 is an earlier version of the package that enables the extraction of activations from PyTorch models. This version laid the groundwork for subsequent updates.

item.title: jang 2.5.1
item.description: JANG 2.5.1 introduces adaptive mixed-precision quantization for Apple Silicon, enhancing performance for machine learning tasks. It supports DeepSeek-V4 and Kimi K2.6.

item.title: jang 2.5.0
item.description: JANG 2.5.0 is a previous version of the adaptive mixed-precision quantization tool for Apple Silicon, providing foundational support for machine learning applications.

item.title: Sam Altman Wants to Know Whether You’re Human
item.description: Sam Altman has introduced a method to verify human identity, aiming to address concerns about AI impersonation and authentication. This initiative seeks to enhance trust in AI interactions.

item.title: pycode-kg added to PyPI
item.description: Pycode-kg has been added to PyPI, enabling the creation of searchable knowledge graphs from Python repositories. This tool aims to enhance code discoverability and usability.

item.title: Maine lawmakers want to pause data-centre projects
item.description: Maine lawmakers are advocating for a pause on new data center projects due to the rapid rise of AI, seeking more research on the implications of these developments.

item.title: China's DeepSeek releases long-awaited new AI model
item.description: Chinese startup DeepSeek has launched a new AI model, DeepSeek-V4, which boasts an ultra-long context capability. This release follows their previous success in AI reasoning.

item.title: genblaze-nvidia added to PyPI
item.description: Genblaze-nvidia has been added to PyPI, providing media provider adapters for NVIDIA's services, enhancing multimedia processing capabilities for developers.

item.title: genblaze-nvidia 0.2.0
item.description: Genblaze-nvidia 0.2.0 is an earlier version of the media provider adapters for NVIDIA, contributing to the development of multimedia applications.

item.title: Trump’s DOJ Indicted the SPLC. His Supporters Are Already Looking for the Next Target.
item.description: The Justice Department has indicted the Southern Poverty Law Center for allegedly defrauding donors by paying informants in hate groups. This marks a significant escalation in tensions between the DOJ and civil rights organizations.

item.title: Google Flow Music
item.description: Google has launched Flow Music, a generative AI platform that allows users to create, remix, and share high-quality music easily. This innovation aims to democratize music production and enhance creativity.

item.title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Human Resources HR software review: Flexible, powerful, but definitely not perfect
item.description: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Human Resources software is reviewed as flexible and powerful but has notable shortcomings. The review evaluates its effectiveness for managing HR processes in organizations.

item.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway and Identity support VPC egress
item.description: Amazon Bedrock's AgentCore Gateway now supports secure egress traffic management for applications, enhancing communication within Virtual Private Clouds. This update improves security and operational efficiency.

item.title: Nvidia market cap hits $5T, poised to be largest company by April 30
item.description: Nvidia's market capitalization has reached $5 trillion, positioning it to become the largest company by April 30. This reflects the growing impact of AI and technology on market trends.

item.title: deckboss-runtime 0.1.0
item.description: The release of deckboss-runtime 0.1.0 introduces a Jetson-native room inference runtime that is significantly faster than TensorRT. This advancement promises enhanced performance for AI applications.

item.title: deckboss-runtime added to PyPI
item.description: The deckboss-runtime has been added to PyPI, offering a Jetson-native room inference runtime that boasts impressive speed improvements. This makes it more accessible for developers.

item.title: lookover 0.3.0
item.description: Lookover 0.3.0 is an audit logging SDK designed for AI agents, featuring integrations with LangChain and LangGraph. This tool aims to enhance transparency and accountability in AI operations.

item.title: AI Platform Spade Data Inks 7K-SF Lease at 155 West 23rd Street
item.description: Spade Data, an AI platform for financial services, has signed a lease for nearly 7,000 square feet in Manhattan. This marks a significant step for the company in establishing its presence.

item.title: X-Energy’s failed $1 billion SPAC became a $1 billion IPO. The reactor did not change. The market did.
item.description: X-Energy successfully completed a $1 billion IPO, the largest in the nuclear sector, despite previous failures with a SPAC. The offering was highly oversubscribed, reflecting strong market interest.
